rationale: This is a clean task where the agent successfully read the repository's README.md, build.gradle, lint.gradle, .githooks/pre-commit, application.yml, and gradle.properties files. The agent provided a comprehensive summary of the five runtime profiles (local, local-dev, dev, staging, live) and the recommended developer setup for linting (Spring Java Format via checkFormat, pre-commit hook, IntelliJ IDEA integration) and running tests locally (test, unitTest, contextTest, restDocsTest, developTest tasks). The information accurately reflects the documentation in the repository.
